meta.title: SimCraft Web — WoW DPS Simulator
meta.description: Free DPS simulator for World of Warcraft. Log in via Battle.net and check your character's DPS.

To confirm, type DELETE below.

info.subtitle: DPS/HPS simulator for World of Warcraft powered by SimulationCraft
info.about_body: SimCraft Web is a free web tool for simulating World of Warcraft character performance. It uses the SimulationCraft engine — an open-source project used by the WoW community for over a decade. Just log in via Battle.net and the app handles the rest.
info.sources_bnet: character data: class, spec, gear, talents, item level; login via OAuth 2.0
info.sources_simc: open-source simulation engine; generates a character profile and calculates DPS/HPS based on thousands of combat iterations
info.stored_title: 💾 What we store in your profile
stored_items: Battle.net identifier (BNet ID) and account name
List of WoW characters fetched from the Blizzard API (class, spec, realm, item level)
Simulation history (character, spec, fight style, DPS, date)
Simulation result files in JSON format — accessible via a unique link
Favourite simulations and emoji reactions added to results
Preference settings: theme (dark/light), language (PL/EN), main character, profile privacy
info.sensitive_body1: We do not collect or store sensitive data within the meaning of GDPR (Art. 9). We have no access to your Battle.net password — login is handled exclusively via the official Blizzard OAuth 2.0.
info.sensitive_body2: The only personal data we process is your public Battle.net account identifier and public character data available through the Blizzard API (character name, realm, class, item level). This data is necessary for the simulator to function and is not shared with third parties.
info.gdpr_art15_desc: you can download all data associated with your account as a JSON file
info.gdpr_art17_desc: you can permanently delete your account along with all data and simulation result files
info.contact_body: Questions, bug reports and suggestions — please use

errors.session_expired: Session expired. Please log in again.
errors.server: Server error. Please try again later.

vault.error_invalid_item: Every item must have a name and slot.
